name: ntfy
description: Simple HTTP-based pub-sub notification service. Send push notifications to your phone or desktop via scripts.
questions: Does it support authentication and access control?
Is there a hosted cloud version available?
instructions: Focus on new notification features, self-hosting improvements, authentication changes, and client library updates.

alternatives.name: Pushover
alternatives.comment: Paid SaaS, simple API, iOS/Android apps.

alternatives.name: Gotify
alternatives.comment: Self-hosted only, real-time push via WebSocket.
